raw.subject: Your Clovis page caught my eye, Buddy B’s bbq and catering!
raw.body:
Hi,

Your photos of the Clovis farmers market really stand out. It's clear you're passionate about supporting local vendors.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which may be leaving potential customers unable to easily find your menu and operating hours. As a restaurant, being easily accessible is crucial for attracting new business.

I sketched out a homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts, including a menu hero section showcasing your signature BBQ dishes and a hours block so customers can easily find when you're open. I also included a photo gallery and map & directions to make it easy for people to find you.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/buddy-b-s-bbq-and-catering-clovis/

If you're interested in exploring ways to showcase your business online, I'd love to discuss a simple and straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Please reply or give me a quick call to get more details.
